description: CompositionBlue kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, Mandarin neck, pintucks along the length of the kurta with a patched placket that has metallic embellishments, and has printed and paneled strips along the front upper chestFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this blue kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this stylishly paneled front, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled sandals and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtassHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
